strategy: Attack with Death (+5%) or use a prism; he resists Life 73%.

The core trap: every time he takes new damage he stacks a +10% resist aura, up to -100% and fully immune. You get essentially one real hit, so never chip him. Stack all your blades and Feints first, then land one massive hit.
Do not remove or change his aura; that triggers an instant -100% Fortify. Leave it alone.
Keep him below full health at end of round: at full health he Leafstorms your team for 15% of your health and Enfeebles everyone, while below full he only heals about 5% (+698).
Avoid healing; any heal, including pet may-casts, puts a +20% Dragonspear on the healer. Survive with shields.
He is stunable and beguilable, so stun to buy safe setup rounds, then unload your one big burst.
cheatNotes: Arriving late gets you Camp Bandit, so join on time.
Each time he takes new damage he adds +10% resist (up to -100% and immune). Do not chip him; set up fully and hit once, hard.
Later ticks of a DoT do not add to that resist stack, so a DoT's follow-up ticks are free damage.
At full health at end of round he Leafstorms your team for 15% of your health, so keep him below full.
That Leafstorm is followed by an Enfeeble on all enemies, gutting your damage.
His Leafstorm also feeds his Adapt requirement, giving him a power pip.
If he is not at full health at end of round he just heals about 5% (+698) instead of Leafstorming.
Entangle will not stop that heal, so do not count on it.
Any heal you cast puts a +20% Dragonspear on the healer, buffing his next hit. Avoid healing.
Even pet may-cast heals trigger the Dragonspear cheat.
Removing or changing his aura triggers an instant -100% Fortify. Leave his aura alone.
Even overwriting it with a negative aura like Pathogen triggers the cheat, keeping the resist effect underneath.
If his Humango Assistant is still alive when his opening -10% aura expires, this immunity cheat fires, so pressure that add.
If the Assistant is dead in time, he swaps to a -20% Fortify and the cheat comes a round later instead.
